summary.zh: 识别用户围绕同一目标反复提出请求的模式。
summary.en: Detects repeated user requests around the same target, task, or object.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要判断用户是否在同一对象、同一任务或同一意图上多次重复要求时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this to determine whether the user repeatedly asks about the same object, task, or intent.

limitations.zh: 用户逐步补充细节也会形成重复请求，需要结合是否发生返工判断。
limitations.en: Incremental detail can look like repetition, so interpret it with whether rework occurred.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的用户回合内容，证据引用只保留 event id。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope user turns and keeps only event ids in evidence references.
